title: Optimized ERC1155 safeTransferFrom with inline slot derivation and external call checks
explanation: This function combines balance slot calculation using a master seed, updates balances securely, emits a 4-topic log, and manually formats calldata to call `onERC1155Received` on smart contract recipients, bubbling up reverts explicitly.
when_not_to_apply: When heavy custom hooks are required inside the transfer loop
